stories.h: Google I/O: Gemini agents woven through Search, Android, and Workspace
stories.s: Google's answer to the agent era — distribution as the moat.
b: Agentic Search plans and books multi-step tasks end to end.
AI Mode becomes the default search experience in the US.

stories.h: OpenAI completes restructuring into a public benefit corporation
stories.s: Ends two years of governance drama — and clears the runway for an eventual IPO.
b: Nonprofit retains control rights over safety decisions.
Microsoft's stake converts under renegotiated terms.

stories.h: US and China reach limited truce on chip export controls
stories.s: A thaw with limits — mid-tier chips flow again, frontier hardware stays fenced.
b: Nvidia's China-spec chips get export licenses restored.
Frontier GPU restrictions remain fully in place.

stories.h: GitHub: a third of all new code is now agent-written
stories.s: The clearest single number yet on how fast software work is changing.
b: Measured across public and private repos with attribution telemetry.
Review time, not writing time, is now the bottleneck.

stories.h: UN adopts first binding framework on military AI
stories.s: Narrow but real: autonomous weapons now have their first international rules.
b: Requires human authorization for lethal decisions.
US, China, and Russia all signed with reservations.

stories.h: Stability AI acquired by Adobe in distressed sale
stories.s: The end of the first open-image-model era — and a consolidation signal for the middle of the market.
b: Price undisclosed; reported far below peak valuation.
Adobe commits to keeping SD models open-weight.

stories.h: Sidewalk delivery robots cross 1M deliveries a week in US cities
stories.s: Boring, small, and everywhere — the robot economy arrives at ankle height.
b: Led by Serve, Starship, and Coco across 40 cities.
Cities now drafting sidewalk congestion rules.

stories.h: Revised scaling laws: reasoning gains compound with tool use
stories.s: The new curve everyone will cite — capability forecasting just got redrawn.
b: Tool-augmented models improve faster than raw scaling predicted.
Implies agents, not chatbots, capture most future gains.

stories.h: Duolingo walks back "AI-first" messaging after user revolt
stories.s: A case study in how not to talk about replacing humans — the backlash beat the strategy.
b: CEO clarifies contractors will stay for content review.
App-store review-bombing campaign organized on TikTok.

stories.h: Perplexity raises at an $18B valuation despite lawsuits
stories.s: Investors are betting answer engines beat both search and news — publishers disagree, in court.
b: Revenue-sharing program expanded to 200 publishers.
Dow Jones suit heads to trial in the fall.
